options.a: Height above ground or water of the lowest layer of cloud below 20000 ft covering more than half of the sky.
options.b: Height above ground or water of the lowest layer of cloud independent on the amount of clouds.
options.c: Height above ground or water of the lowest layer of cloud that contributes to the overall overcast.
options.d: Height above ground or water of the highest layer of cloud or obscuring phenomena aloft that covers 4 oktas or more of the sky.
